meta.title: Sofra — Restaurant software with a warm heart
meta.description: QR menus, live orders, reservations and loyalty — one kitchen-friendly platform, proven in a real restaurant every single service. Sofra means a table laid for guests.

hero.subtitle: Sofra is the warm-hearted restaurant platform: QR menus, live orders, reservations and loyalty — everything your front-of-house and kitchen need, on one table.
hero.note: A «sofra» is a table laid for guests. That's the whole philosophy.
hero.proof: Running every service at RUMI Restaurant, Geneva — orders, kitchen, reservations and printers, live in production.

features.label: What's cooking
features.title: Everything on one table
features.subtitle: Six courses, no filler. Each one battle-tested in a real restaurant before it ever reached this page.

qr.title: QR menus & ordering
qr.text: Guests scan, browse and order from the table — with photos, allergens and customizations. No app to install.

live.title: Live order boards
live.text: Kitchen, cashier and servers each get their own live view. New orders arrive the second they're placed.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.text: Table planning, working hours and availability — guests book online, you approve with a tap.

loyalty.title: Loyalty points
loyalty.text: Fidelity points that bring regulars back, with discount rules you control per customer group.

printing.title: Kitchen tickets, printed
printing.text: A companion app drives your thermal printers — orders hit the kitchen on paper, exactly where you want them.

languages.title: 10 languages built in
languages.text: Your menu speaks your guests' languages out of the box — from French to Dutch to Arabic.

one.title: Tell us about your place
one.text: Name, menu, tables, hours. A conversation, not a setup wizard.

two.title: We lay your sofra
two.text: We set up your menu, QR codes, printers and staff views — and hand you the keys.

three.title: You serve
three.text: Orders flow, tickets print, regulars collect points. We keep the plates spinning behind the scenes.

showcase.label: The proof of the pudding
showcase.title: Taste it live
showcase.subtitle: Sofra isn't a slideware demo — it has been running a real dining room, every service, since day one.
showcase.cardBody: QR menus on every table, orders flowing to the kitchen and cashier screens, reservations, loyalty points and thermal tickets — all running on Sofra.
showcase.cardHint: Open the menu and browse like a guest — that's exactly the product.
showcase.ctaBody: Restaurant, café or takeaway — tell us about your place and we'll get back to you within a day.

pricing.label: Menu
pricing.title: Menu du jour
pricing.subtitle: Early access — simple as a chalkboard.

founding.name: Founding restaurants
founding.detail: Free during early access. White-glove onboarding, direct line to the founders, and a say in what we cook next.

regular.name: Regular menu
regular.detail: Fair monthly pricing when we're out of early access. Founding restaurants keep a lifetime discount.

pricing.note: No card required. No lock-in. Your data is yours.

partner.label: Partners
partner.title: Set tables with us
partner.subtitle: You know restaurateurs who deserve better software. Bring them to the table — we handle the tech, you keep the relationship.

find.title: Find
find.text: Spot restaurants and cafés that would love Sofra — your network, your cities.

onboard.title: Onboard
onboard.text: Track every client from first call to live service in your partner dashboard; we do the technical setup.

earn.title: Earn
earn.text: A commission for every restaurant you bring that goes live. Transparent ledger, no fine print.

form.success: Application received! We review every partner personally and will get back to you within a couple of days.

waitlist.title: Get a seat at the table
waitlist.subtitle: No waitlist — we onboard restaurants personally, one by one. Tell us about your place and we'll get you started.

footer.tagline: A sofra is a table laid for guests.
footer.madeIn: Cooked up in the Netherlands, first served in Geneva

what.a: Sofra is a restaurant management platform: QR menus and online ordering, live order boards for kitchen, cashier and servers, reservations, loyalty points and thermal-printer tickets — all in one place. It grew out of the system running every service at RUMI Restaurant in Geneva.

pricing.a: During early access, founding restaurants pay nothing — setup and support are on the house, and founding restaurants keep a lifetime discount when regular pricing arrives. Regular plans will be simple flat monthly pricing with optional add-on modules.

payments.q: Can my guests pay online — including TWINT?
payments.a: Online payments are on the roadmap as an add-on module, with local payment methods like TWINT in Switzerland and iDEAL in the Netherlands planned alongside cards. Today, orders flow to your counter and you charge as you always have.

languages.q: Which languages does the menu support?
languages.a: Ten languages out of the box — English, French, German, Dutch, Italian, Spanish, Turkish, Arabic, Russian and Chinese. Your guests order in their own language from the same menu.

printing.q: Does it work with my kitchen printer?
printing.a: Yes. A companion app (Windows and Android) drives ESC/POS thermal printers over the network, so orders print in the kitchen exactly where you want them — no extra hardware subscription.

who.q: Who is behind Sofra, and is it actually used anywhere?
who.a: Sofra is built by a small team based in the Netherlands, and it runs every live service at RUMI Restaurant in Geneva (rumirestaurant.ch) — orders, kitchen board, reservations and printers have been in production there since June 2026. We onboard new restaurants personally.

domain.q: Can I use my own domain name?
domain.a: Yes. Every restaurant gets a free sofra subdomain, and you can connect a domain you already own — or we register a brand-new one for you during setup.

dashboard.title: Your clients
dashboard.intro: Every restaurant you bring to the table, from first call to live service.
dashboard.empty: No clients yet — add the first restaurant above.

pipeline.onboardingRequested: Onboarding requested — Sofra is on it. You'll see this go Live here.

pipeline.moveToAgreed: Move the client to Agreed first
pipeline.sofraSetsUp: Sofra sets up the restaurant and flips it Live.

ledger.title: Commission ledger
ledger.intro: Recorded by Sofra; payouts are settled outside the app for now.
ledger.empty: Nothing recorded yet — your first commission will appear here.

thanks.title: Thank you!
thanks.body: Your payment is being processed. Once it's confirmed, your Sofra subscription starts automatically — we'll be in touch shortly.
thanks.questions: Questions? Just reply to any Sofra email.

applications.title: Partner applications
applications.approvedNote: Approved — invite emailed. Backup link (24h, single use):

billing.title: Billing
billing.intro: Sofra → tenant subscriptions via Mollie (ADR-011 Job A). Create a billing account, send the tenant the first-payment link; the subscription starts itself once the mandate lands.
billing.mollieMissing: MOLLIE_API_KEY is not set on this environment — creating billing accounts is disabled.

billingForm.name: Billing name (restaurant / company)
billingForm.created: Created. Send the tenant this first-payment link (also on the detail page):
billingForm.noCheckout: No checkout link returned — check the detail page.

billingDetail.checkoutIntro: Send this to the tenant — paying it creates the recurring mandate and auto-starts the plan.
billingDetail.cancelConfirm: Cancel this subscription? Mollie stops charging immediately.

clients.title: All clients
clients.onboardingHint: Provision via the deploy-repo scripts (ADR-003), then set the tenant slug and mark LIVE.

partners.title: Partners
partners.empty: No partners yet — approve an application first.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.intro: Read-only view of the deploy repo's tenant registry (ADR-007). Lifecycle changes go through git + the provision scripts (ADR-003), not this page.

errors.invalidClient: Restaurant name is required (email must be valid).
errors.statusManaged: This client's status is managed by Sofra now.
errors.applicationDecided: Application not found or already decided.

errors.invalidSlug: Tenant slug: lowercase letters, digits, dashes.
errors.slugTaken: That tenant slug is already in use.
errors.clientNotOwned: Client doesn't belong to this partner.
errors.mollieNotConfigured: Mollie is not configured (MOLLIE_API_KEY missing on this environment).

errors.billingCreateFailed: Creating the billing account failed — see server logs.
errors.activationInFlight: Activation in flight — retry once the plan settles.
